MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem Will Chen, Clerks K. Shaw/M. Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218/206)

Appearances:
Plaintiff Atigue Rehman is present.
Marc Seidenfeld representing the plaintiff.

Defendants Lisa Laughon and Tavia Borgi are present.
J.R. Gabbard representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

This case has settled, stipulation filed with the clerk, the trial date is off calendar.
